cases.query: Yellow-orange powdery spots under leaves with yellow halos
followup_answers: Mostly on middle and lower leaves
Yes, orange powder is mainly under the leaves
It started around two weeks ago and is spreading

cases.query: Uniform yellowing of older lower leaves, no distinct spots
followup_answers: Older lower leaves are affected first
No powder or insect holes, only yellowing
Growth is slow and leaves are generally pale

cases.query: Yellowing between veins while veins stay green on older leaves
followup_answers: This pattern is mostly on older leaves
Veins remain green while tissue between veins is yellow
No major spots or fungal powder seen

cases.query: Small round holes at berry tip and berries shriveling
followup_answers: Yes, tiny holes are at the berry end
Some berries are shriveled and drop early
I noticed powder-like frass near the hole

cases.query: Dark brown sunken spots on green berries with pink mass in wet weather
followup_answers: Spots are sunken and dark on green berries
Pinkish spores appear when humidity is high
No boring holes were observed

cases.query: Circular brown spots with pale gray center on leaves
followup_answers: Spots are round with gray center and brown edge
Mostly on leaves, not berries
No orange powder under leaves

cases.query: Plant wilting suddenly even when soil has enough water, roots look brown
followup_answers: Wilting continues even after irrigation
Roots are dark brown and soft
Decline started from the root zone

cases.query: Young leaves are pale yellow while veins remain green
followup_answers: Young top leaves are affected first
Interveinal yellowing is clear with green veins
Older leaves look less affected

cases.query: Stem has small holes with sawdust and branches drying
followup_answers: Small stem holes are visible
Sawdust-like frass is around the holes
Upper branches are drying progressively

cases.query: Top branches wilting progressively and vascular tissue turns brown
followup_answers: Wilting started in top canopy and spread downward
Cut stems show brown vascular discoloration
No clear insect frass around stem holes

cases.query: Leaves have fine yellow speckles and bronze look with tiny mites
followup_answers: Fine yellow stippling is visible on leaves
Leaves look bronzed and dusty
Tiny mites/webbing are visible under leaves

cases.query: Leaf tips and margins turn into large irregular brown dry patches
followup_answers: Damage starts at leaf tips and margins
Patches are irregular and dry brown
Not seeing central gray circular lesions
